name: Italian Chicken Sticks
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the tomato juice, olive oil, dried oregano, garlic powder, and hot pepper sauce in a small bowl.
2. Cut the chicken into strips that are 1/2 inch wide and 2 inches long.
3. Add the chicken strips to the bowl and mix until they are completely coated with the marinade.
4. Refrigerate for at least 15 minutes or up to an hour.
5. Preheat the oven to 475 degrees F.
6. Line a baking pan with foil.
7. Place the bread crumbs in another small bowl.
8. Remove one chicken strip at a time from the marinade and roll it in the bread crumbs.
9. Place the crumb-coated strips in the foil-lined pan, arranging them so they aren't touching each other.
10. Discard the marinade.
11. Bake the chicken for 8 minutes until it is firm and the crumb coating is brown and crunchy.
12. Serve immediately.
